steps.name: review-pack-contract-renderer
steps.summary: Added kifrs/workflows/kifrs1116/review_pack.py plus tests/test_1116_review_pack.py and a public sample report; RP1 composes existing 1116 runner, memo, journal entry, disclosure, checklist without adding new judgment logic. Verification passed: 20 tests.

steps.name: fixture-review-pack-regression
steps.summary: Extended tests/test_1116_review_pack.py to cover all 10 fixtures and added docs/reports/2026-07-04-rp2-1116-review-pack-fixture-summary.md. Result: 9 automated review packs and 1 needs_human_review, matching AE1 completion boundary. Verification passed: 20 tests.

steps.name: needs-human-review-checklist
steps.summary: Structured review_pack.needs_human_review as accountant action checklist items with issue, blocker reason, required inputs, review questions, and candidate K-IFRS 1116 guidance. scenario_09 now renders 추가자료/리뷰질문/1116-46 direction while automated packs expose company-policy and conditional disclosure follow-ups. Verification passed: 20 tests.
